atlas_description: The atlas-core dashboard. Cross-atlas registry inspector + analysis-routing UI: conversation (LLM funnel, deferred), action (readiness & routing dashboard), registries (chains and compatibility, with brick-edit sidebar), catalogue (modules & analyses). Pages migrated 2026-05-14 from toolkit_registries/relatedness/page/ into the AtlasRouter so they appear as the first atlas in the topbar.
_round_1_note: Round-1 migration: the four standalone HTML files in toolkit_registries/relatedness/page/ were converted to the AtlasRouter fragment + module convention. Behaviour is preserved verbatim apart from: (a) the inner topnav was removed (the shell topbar replaces it); (b) inline <style> blocks were merged into css/core_pages.css and scoped under .core-page; (c) inline <script> bodies were wrapped in exported mount()/unmount() functions; (d) registry-data fetch paths are rooted at toolkit_registries/relatedness/ via a single REGISTRY_ROOT constant per page so the workspace-relative fetches resolve under the assembled workspace.

pages.label: 1. Conversation
pages.tooltip: Free-text request → cleaned decomposition → controlled vocabulary → registry contracts → action plan. Status: deferred — wired LLM funnel arrives later; today this page documents the design and points at page 2 for hand-composed runs.

pages.label: 2. Action
pages.tooltip: Readiness & routing dashboard. Pick a target analysis + scope; the dashboard walks the chain backward and shows each step's status (RESULT_READY / RUN_READY / SPAWNABLE / BLOCKED / MISSING) plus the biomod module's state. Does not run anything.

pages.label: 3. Registries
pages.tooltip: Chains and compatibility browser. Visualizes existing ngsRelate → ngsPedigree → mendelian chains, lists all registered results, and lets you click any chain brick to derive a biomod recipe in the side panel.

pages.label: 4. Catalogue
pages.tooltip: Modules & analyses catalogue. Two tabs: biomod modules (one card per module, status-coloured) and analysis modes (one card per analysis × mode). Click anywhere a registry id is shown to hover-preview the underlying TSV row.

pages.label: 5. Inventory
pages.tooltip: Cross-atlas "what's loaded right now". Four tabs: live envelopes (GET /api/layers), per-atlas manifest pages, per-atlas registries (5 JSON files each), toolkit_registries TSVs. Click any row to inspect its JSON / TSV payload.

_stylesheets_doc: Shared stylesheet for the four dashboard pages. Extracted from the four <style> blocks in the original toolkit_registries/relatedness/page/*.html files and scoped under .core-page to avoid colliding with sibling atlases.

stages.label: registry dashboard
stages._doc: Single-stage atlas. Conversation → Action → Registries → Catalogue is a recommended reading order, but the four pages are each independently usable.
